{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Takatano Shrine | native_name = 高田神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takatano Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Takatano Shrine'''|高田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigesha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigesha|WD=Q135038714}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181966</ref> * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} ** Series ordinal: 1415 * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181966</ref> * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181966</ref> ** Series ordinal: 1425 * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|WD=Q11071125}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181966</ref>
